overview: A mobile-first carpool app exclusively for VIT students to share rides to Chennai Airport and Railway Station. Features email/password auth with VIT domain restriction, gender-based ride filtering, female-only ride posting, a join request/approval system, group chat, and a clean premium UI.
features: Email/password signup and login with @vitstudent.ac.in restriction
Forgot password with in-app OTP flow
Female-only ride toggle for female users
Female Only badge on restricted rides
Group chat for joined rides only
My Rides split into Posted and Joined tabs
Ride withdrawal that frees seats and removes from chat
